description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly white upper, accented by black and gray marbled patterns and bold black geometric details. The shoe features a thick, sculpted sole with deep grooves and layered black and white elements, providing both visual interest and functional grip. The upper includes a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with a standard criss-cross lacing system using black laces. The heel area is reinforced with additional material and horizontal black stripes, while the side displays a large, angular black overlay. The interior appears cushioned and lined with a darker material for support. Overall, the design is modern and urban, suitable for streetwear or sports activities.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with a white, black, and gray marbled design, thick sculpted sole, and bold geometric accents. Features include a padded collar, criss-cross lacing, and reinforced heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the marbled white upper, large black overlay, and thick sculpted sole with black accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the padded tongue, criss-cross black laces, and rounded toe with marbled pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the marbled upper, black geometric details, and layered sole design.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, horizontal black stripes on the heel, and interior lining.
